reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the founding years for Vanderbilt University and Emory University.
2. Compare the founding years and return which university was founded first.
original_final_question: Was Vanderbilt University or Emory University founded first? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Vanderbilt University was founded in 1873, while Emory University was founded in 1836, so Emory University was founded first. -> Emory University
